problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: If Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type is applied to chemistry, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
